title: The Spectator - May 16, 2026 - Part 256
content:
Go to spectator.com/teaparty26to enter the ballot today.

To become a subscriber, go to spectator.com/join be notified by Wednesday 10 June. This is a subscriber-only event.

We will select 100 subscribers at random to attend the event. Successful entrants will on Thursday 2 July. Enter the ballot before Sunday 7 June.

Join                                                                    Spectator writers and fellow subscribers for tea in our garden overlooking St James’s Park .

THURSDAY 2 JULY                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             3–5 P.
